commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And the bones of Saul and Jonathan his son buried they in the country of Benjamin in Zelah, in the sepulcher of Kish his father: and they performed all that the king commanded. And after that God heeded prayers for the land. Side of the mountain, or in distinct cavities. (Calmet) Many suppose that Tselá, or Sela, is the name of a place (Menochius) not far from Gabaa, Josue xviii. (Calmet) Many proper names are thus translated.
